content.en:
In the following days, Ye Tian and Ye Xingchen were here to comprehend the Eternal Source Stone Statue.

It is divided into several areas, and each area has built a meditation tower, and one person occupies a meditation tower, without interfering with each other.

If you leave, you can leave directly from the Zenwu Pagoda.

And so time passed.

Ten thousand years passed in a flash, and Ye Tian and Ye Xingchen were cultivating except for occasionally going to the outside world to understand the situation.

Now, the Xuanxu Ancient Realm has exposed many half-step domain ancestors, so the Forbidden Zerg is no longer considered a threat, and it has long been suppressed in an area by the Xuanxu Ancient Realm, and the Forbidden Zerg is used as a Gu to raise, and even often sends some dead creatures to the Forbidden Zerg, so that the Forbidden Zerg nest breeds more Forbidden Zerg.

The Half-Step Domain Ancestors also knew that the Forbidden Zerg Lair had a King Worm Cocoon inside, but they were not worried.

The half-step domain ancestors were not worried, and Ye Tian was naturally not very worried.

After all, the half-step domain ancestors were still so calm when they knew that there was a worm king cocoon, and it was estimated that they knew the situation of the worm king worm cocoon, so they were not afraid of accidents.

......

this day.

Ye Tian finished his retreat, and his time for enlightenment was up, although he could still use his points to continue his meditation, but there was no need for it now.

After all, he still needs to absorb the harvest and progress this time, otherwise it will not be good for him to take a big step, and it is easy to be ambitious.

At this time, Ye Tian's Forbidden Dao was already several times stronger than before, and even Ye Tian's Endless Dao had been greatly improved.

In the past, Ye Tian didn't know where the limit of his Endless Dao was, if he couldn't touch the limit, how to impact the Invincible Dao Ancestor level.

But now, he felt the limit of the Endless Dao, if he was to compete with the Endless Dao according to the percentage, he had already reached the level of thirty percent, although he was still far from the limit of the Endless Dao, but at least he saw the end.

Moreover, he also has countless insights into the Forbidden Dao Technique, but he needs to digest it well before he can truly transform the harvest into strength.

So, Ye Tian left the Enlightenment Tower, left the Wind Mountain, and returned to the human realm where the human race is currently located.

Next, Ye Tian began to cultivate the Forbidden Dao Technique in a 100,000-fold time acceleration environment.

At present, the forbidden Dao techniques he has mastered are the Dark Extreme Dao Spear, the Shadow Thorn, the Shadow Escape, and the Nine Extreme Armor Four Forbidden Dao Techniques, among which only the Dark Extreme Dao Spear is a forbidden Dao technique.

But now, Ye Tian was sure that he had cultivated all these four forbidden Dao techniques to the Xiaocheng realm, and he could imagine how much the Eternal Source Stone Statue had helped him.

In addition, Ye Tian had previously assisted three forbidden talents from the Shadow Dapeng Eagle, among which the forbidden talent: Metal Swallowing is a very rare and powerful forbidden talent, which can allow Ye Tian to continuously devour ore to enhance the body's defense.

Even the material of Immortal Black Gold could be devoured, and if there were enough rare veins, he could temper his physical body to the point of surpassing top-level forbidden defensive weapons.

At that time, even a half-step domain ancestor would not be able to kill him with a single blow.

Subsequently, while Ye Tian practiced the Forbidden Dao Technique, he used the Forbidden Talent: Devouring Gold and Devouring Various Rare Ores to improve his body defense.

In a flash, tens of thousands of years have passed in the outside world.

this day.

Ye Tian's four forbidden dao techniques had all been raised to the realm of Xiaocheng, and the power of each forbidden dao technique had increased a lot, far surpassing the forbidden dao techniques at the level of non-entry.

This ascension speed was much faster than in the past, but the perception that Ye Tian had gained from comprehending the Eternal Source Stone Statue was almost exhausted.

In addition to this, Ye Tian created another forbidden Dao technique - Devouring Everything!

This Forbidden Dao Technique is completely based on the Forbidden Dao Technique: Forbidden Dao Technique created by Swallowing Gold, which can accelerate the refining of various rare ore materials, and can devour part of the enemy's attack energy, which is very terrifying.

In addition, with the help of the top-level Forbidden Spirit Root Tree and the Forbidden Blood Crystal, Ye Tian raised his cultivation to the extreme of almost the strongest Dao Ancestor, and if the Endless Dao reached the limit, he could even impact the Invincible Dao Ancestor realm.

However, Ye Tian's current combat power is also much stronger than before, and even he can't estimate his combat strength.

But if he was compared to an ordinary invincible Dao Ancestor, he could easily crush and even kill the other party.

"I don't know who is more powerful compared to the top existence among the Invincible Dao Ancestors?"

Ye Tian muttered.

this day.

Many Dao Ancestors found that the benefits of sacrificing the Forbidden Zerg were very few, not as many as they were at the beginning, which led to the value of the Forbidden Zerg corpse getting lower and lower, and even few Dao Ancestors went to hunt the Forbidden Zerg.

Ye Tian knew that this was the origin of the Xuanxu Ancient Realm, and there was not much demand for the Forbidden Zerg, or that the Forbidden Zerg would sacrifice to the Origin, and it would be difficult to strengthen the Origin.

If it continued, the Forbidden Zerg would not even be of any help to the Xuanxu Ancient Realm.

As a result, the half-step domain ancestors of the major forces got together and held a meeting.

The participants in the meeting were the Qinglong Palace Master and the Eternal Dao Ancestor, and the Golden Crow Palace Lord and the Mystic Law Dao Ancestor were not interested in this matter, so they did not participate.

meeting.

The Qinglong Palace Lord proposed: "Everyone, the Forbidden Zerg is of little value to the Xuanxu Ancient Realm, if you continue to raise Gu like this, it is estimated that it will be useless for me, I propose to completely destroy the Forbidden Zerg!"

Migu Daozu frowned and said: "Qinglong Palace Master, although the strength of the Forbidden Zerg has been greatly reduced now, even we can't shake the Forbidden Zerg lair, I'm afraid that even the second step is a half-step domain ancestor who is worth the third step, and there is no way to destroy the Forbidden Zerg lair." Moreover, once we enter the Forbidden Zerg's lair, we are not the opponent of the lord-level Forbidden Zerg at all, how can we completely destroy the Forbidden Zerg?"

Migu Dao Ancestor's worries were also the worries of Zhenyu Dao Ancestors and Heavenly Brahma Dao Ancestors, and they didn't dare to rashly enter the inside of the Forbidden Zerg Lair.

"Don't worry, our Heavenly Emperor Palace's Golden Crow Palace Lord and Black Wind Mountain's Mystic Law Dao Ancestor will also enter the Forbidden Zerg's lair at that time, and your goal is just to deal with the Commander-level Forbidden Zerg. Don't tell me that inside the Forbidden Zerg lair, you can't beat the Commander-level Forbidden Zerg?"

The main road of the Qinglong Palace.

"Then I'm fine!"

Migu Daozu agreed.

Next, the two sides discussed the issue of benefits.

In short, enter the inside of the forbidden zerg lair, once there is any gain, it will be distributed according to the merit, and you can't snatch each other.

Soon after.

The plan to invade the forbidden zerg lair has begun!
